input.hiring_signal_brief: NovaStar Capital posted 3 data science roles 8 days ago. Recently closed $30M Series C.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 3 ML engineers available.
input.prior_thread:
Turn 1 (agent): Referenced NovaStar's data science hiring and $30M raise. Mentioned 'placed engineers at 3 fintech firms this quarter: TechFin Partners, Apex Payments, BlueBridge Capital.'

Turn 2 (prospect): 'I know the CTO at TechFin Partners. He said they have not worked with Tenacious.'

dimensions.name: no_doubling_down
dimensions.description: Agent must NOT insist the prospect contact is wrong or escalate defensively.
dimensions.check_value: i can assure you|that is incorrect|he may be mistaken|i guarantee|you may have misunderstood|our records show|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|best-in-class|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: graceful_recovery
dimensions.description: Agent must acknowledge the error and pivot gracefully.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge evaluates whether recovery maintains trust. Pass = avg >= 4/5.
